summary: Magic system designed following Sanderson's Laws with hard-hybrid structure integrating all required elements: the Pallor's mechanical suppression effect, the Oathbrand's physiological mechanics and Kaelith's life-threatening situation, fae binding contracts with consent-based enforcement, kinetic memory explaining the Quietus location, Ythara's nature as incompatibility rather than evil, and magic as emotional metaphor for the romance. Ten core rules (MAG-001 through MAG-010) define costs, limitations, and boundaries. Six power tiers established with protagonists placed at Tier 4 (Lirien current, Kaelith natural/suppressed). Seven forbidden uses prevent deus ex machina (INV-009). Romantic intersections emphasize power imbalance resolution, the Oathbrand removal as intimacy threshold, shared working creating resonance bonds, and complementary magical styles. System supports both fantasy plot mechanics (god-sealing, Pallor deterioration, the journey) and romance development (vulnerability as magical cost, trust enabling bond formation, the kill contract as literal magical cage). All original names from story-concept.json nameRegistry used throughout.
